feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Subcontracting:how to return non consumed component & how to send more component to subcontractor
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

In subcontracting process how to handle the folowing scenarios 

Scenario 1-  if the quantity consumed  of the raw material 1 is less that what I send : let say I send 10 KG of raw maerial A, only 8 KG wre consumed of material A,  How do I return the 2 KG of raw material A to my company

Scenario 2- If the subcontracting vendor need more quantity, let say I send him 5 KG of raw material B, but in the process he needed 1 KG more (some quantity was damaged in the subcontractor premises) , howcan I send him the 1KG needed of material B

 

Thank you so much

 

Regards

entry.title: strategy 81 with considering lot size restrictions/parameters
entry.content:
We would like to use strategy 81 (assemble to order with planned orders) and also take the lot sizes (max. lot size) into account.
Example: With a maximum lot size of 6 pieces, 2 planned orders should be created for a customer order of 8 pieces via assemble to order processing (planned orders). One for 6 pieces and one for 2 pieces.

We need it because we need the availability check for the components and also the capacity check. But we also need the system to consider the lot sizes from the material because of the restrictions on the production shopfloor.


Can the lot sizes from the material master be taken into account in assembly processing or not?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: SAP GUI Power user not working on desktop
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we are using Citrix to access SAP GUI + SAP Power user when wfh. We are planning on removing people"s access to Citrix later this month so have moved these 2 applications onto peoples desktops; however for some users they are not able to access the applications (are getting a logon balancing error).

Could you provide some assistance with this issue?

entry.title: Recording QVM3 with SHDB problem
entry.content:
after execute selection-screen, program SAPLSVLC_FULLSCREEN starts.

i want to escape saplslvc_fullscreen and execute sapmssyo to start next process.

how should i do

entry.title: Combining POs with different Purchase organizations in one inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I faced a problem with creation of inbound delivery. It should refer to few POs with different Purchasing organizations. Does anyone have such experience? I tried but the system returns an error "delivery split because the partners are different. Message no. VL014"
and then it splits the inbound delivery on the quantity of purch organizations.

Is this possible to switch off this option and combine all POs with different Purch orgs in one inb deliv?

I tried to look in SPRO but the only criteria for split there is warehouse. 

Will be very much obliged for any ideas,

Elena

entry.title: Message Server Access Control List
entry.content:
Hi Team,

As per the As per the EWA reports : Message Server Access Control List section showing in RED.
Where HOST=* is maintained in SAP applications servers. The parameter ms/acl_info having the  HOST=* is maintained all the SAP servers.

As given in the SAP note: 821875 - Security settings in the message server 

The parameter ms/acl_info, must contain all machine names, domains, IP addresses and/or subnet masks for the application servers that are allowed to log on to the message server. You can either list the names or enter each name in a separate line.

This means this file should list the IPs or hostnames of all the application servers of the same SID or if any Internal and external systems which are connecting to our SAP system we need to maintained all the host and IP we need to updated here ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Controlling Sales to Blocked Customer in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi SAP SD Experts,

In SAP (ECC), we have one customer (SH) with two different SAP numbers and are selling to them from two different entities. The problem is that I have blocked one customer number in entity one, but the other entity is still selling to the same customer, even though they are blocked, due to the different SAP number. How can I control this scenario?

Say - A -Customer 

Company code -TR10-(Customer number is 0001 For customer A)

Company code-PL10 (Customer number is 0002 For customer A)

If blocked customer A(001) in CC TR10, system allowed me to sale to customer 0002 from CC PL10 due to different SAP number.

And not possible to extend the customer from TR10 TO PL10 Receiving error below

entry.title: How to auto generate DME file in AL11 from F100
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S4 Hana Private Cloud system, the requirement is to generate DME file in AL11 directory once the payment has been processed from F110 automatically. User should only run F110, and the file should be sent to bank automatically.

Currently to place the DME file in AL11, we need to run FBPM with the selected variant then only system is placing the file in the directory.

How to achieve this in SAP?

Regards,
Tanya

entry.title: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Does SAP Kernel 753PL1436 addresses the vulnerabilities of SAP Note 3537476?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create graduated totals for P&L in the Financial Statement Version
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am trying to create graduated totals for some P&L items in the FSV using transaction OB58, but I don’t know how to use the functionality correctly.

In the attached screenshot, I want to create a subtotal for Gross Income = Revenue - COGS.

Could you advise me on how to build graduated totals in this case so that I can properly display the subtotals?

Best regards,
Stefan

entry.title: SWPM crashing on SLES
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to run a clean installation of SAP ERP 6.0 on SLES 15 SP16. However SWPM is crashing:

I digged up the entire internet:
- Yes, we have 20 GB swap configured
- Yes, we have about 1.8 GB free space in /tmp (everybody says check if you have enough free space, but noone cares to say HOW MUCH is enough!)
- Yes, we have memory, core file, stack and data set to Unlimited for the root user launching SWPM.

Do I need any specific Java version installed ? If yes - WHICH one ?
What else could be causing it ? I have completely run out of ideas...

Many thanks for any useful advice you could give!

entry.title: PG1 SAP Picking List For In Stock and Awaiting Parts
entry.content:
Hello,

We have recently started shipping everything directly from our own warehouse to customers which is a big step for us. But we are having problems from a partial picking stand point. 

Is it possible to create a picking list for the warehouse staff that shows the parts currently in stock and the parts currently awaiting arrival?

For instance, I create an order in VA01 with 4 part numbers. 2 in stock, 2 I have to order in. Is it possible to create a picking list for my warehouse staff that shows this picking list has 2 items they can pick now and 2 items not yet available for this order? 

They basically want the option to start picking incomplete orders to set aside while also being able to see that this order is not complete. How can we do this? When I create a picking list for orders in VA01 it only shows parts available right now, with no indication this order is waiting for parts.

entry.title: Deactivation of Classic Profit center accounting
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have migrated to New GL in FY-2024.Following April to March Calendar year.

Both classic PCA and New Profit center accounting is active in the system.

The ask is to deactivate classic PCA and GLT0.

Can anyone throw some light or provide insights in the below query:

1.What will be the impact of deactivating the classic PCA and GLT0?

2.What steps do we need to follow to avoid any disruption?

Any help will be highly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP PEO - Production Version issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create Production Version in SAP PEO but ending up with this error message "Execution Only BOM usage is not allowed when plg and SF BOMs are same" .

FYI- I have already released relevant BOM and Routing: 

I found similar post https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/execution-only-bom-usage-is-not-allowed-when-plg-and-sf-boms-are-same/qaq-p/13899566

@RaghavanKathamuthu - Any pointers as I see you had this issue and resolved it.

Thanks,

Sid

entry.title: The service entry sheet was not posted when using BAPI_ENTRYSHEET_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am unable to post the service entry sheet with value using BAPI_ENTRYSHEET_CREATE. The service entry sheet is created, but without values. I provided the values in the input, but the values are not being generated

entry.title: Script giving error about screen mismatch in ME21
entry.content:
I'm working to write a script for ME21, which will take Contract information, and use it to create a Purchase Order.

While testing, I always get the same error "No batch input data found for dynpro (SAPMSSY0 0120) SAPMM06E 0101 .   expected." - it is expecting the Purchase Order creation screen, but is still stuck on the Contract line item selection screen. When I view it screen by screen, the script does GO to SAPMM06E 0101, but it stops because it THINKS that it is on SAPMSSY0 0120. 

Is there any way to make the visible screen match the screen listed in the background?

entry.title: Sales order to sales order copy controls VTAA
entry.content:
As per the business requirement while the creating a sales order with reference to another sales order the request delivery date and pricing date should not be copy from the reference document, it should be the present date.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SHD0 - Personal settings of ME52N transaction variant
entry.content:
Good day, 

 

We have a requirement to create a transaction variant for ME52N in SHD0. One of the requirements is to remove the "Personal Settings" button. However, we noticed that the personal setting (Item overview as grid control) in the actual ME52N is still affecting the variant. 

 

Is there a way to set a global setting for this so that whenever the user uses the variant, the "Item overview as grid control" is still unticked?

 

Or

 

Is there a way to set a default value for "Item overview as grid control"?

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Smartform table empty line on some printers
entry.content:
Hi

We are printing our quotations using smartforms.

For displaying the item details, we use a table. When all the items fit within a page, we are good. When we print out/preview quotations where the item table spans across two pages, i get a blank line at the end of the first page. This happens only when printing through specific printers.

I tried with the below printers, configured in the system

  • Windows default printer - blank line appears
  • ZPDF - blank line appears
  • LP01 - no blank line appears

Please note there are no blank lines in the internal table containing the data. Just on the output.

After much search, i found this solution https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/space-rows-in-table-on-smartforms/m-p/12439419/highlight/true#M1998558 

During my analysis, i have discovered that when i alter the font size of my paragraph, depending on the printer it works.

I have figured out how i can get the details of the printer selected for printing. I have also figured out how i can update the form style at runtime or use a control variable to use texts with different paragraph formats, depending on the printer used. For example: I can do a mapping saying, "if device is LP01 use the style/format with font size 9 pts. If device is ZPDF use the style/format with font size 10 pts". This will work, in the current state of the system.

But, i would like to know if there is a specific parameter of the printer can i look at, to specifically understand if this parameter is in this range, use style with font size N etc., For example: (Please forgive me if the terms i use are incorrect/invalid) If the DPI of the printer is 100-200, use the style with font size 9, If the DPI of the printer is 201-300, use the style with font size 10 etc., In this example, DPI is the parameter. And it will be helpful, if anyone can point out how to retrieve this parameter. 

Meanwhile, I am currently diving through various RSPO* FMs and the structures in their packages, to see if there is any way to retrieve the printer properties. 

Your help is much needed and appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: IDOC is send from ECC with status 03 but not showing up in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have IDOC being sent from ECC to SAP PO and not able to see it in SAP PO at adapter level nor in message monitoring. IDOC when triggered from ECC showing status code 03(Successful) and we don't see its stuck in SM58 nor in smq1.We don't also see it in SXMB_MONI in ecc. All the configurations like Port, RFC destinations in ECC and in NWA working fine. We were even getting the IDOC message in PO some days back but we don't see it now. But 1 weird thing we observed this time is that Sender IDOC adapter in PO is showing some message like "No rfc destination found for sid XX. will use default rfc destination for metadata read". So we created fresh sender channel and used in our ICO with same inboundRA details and its not showing this message at channel. ping test is getting successful for both cases.

Could you pls help if anything else to be checked apart from above.

1)Screenshot for Sender Channel showing some weird message

2) Created new channel with same inboundRA details which doesn't show this message.

 

 

 

Regards

Mahesh
